title: Floral Crisp Mediterranean Emmentaler Cheese Fried
description: A crispy and flavorful hangover-cure dish featuring emmental cheese fried in a Mediterranean style, perfect for quick snacking or as an appetizer.

ingredients.name: Almond Meal (or Almond Flour for Nut-Free Option)
Fresh Herbs (like Dill or Chives, finely chopped)

instructions: Mix grated Emmentaler cheese with almond meal and garlic powder. Add herbs if using.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
Form small balls of the mixture and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess grease.
Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
